title: Akagi Ritsuko college degree
wikitext:
[]: Akagi Ritsuko college degree             Quote Post by sofze » Wed Apr 14, 2010 2:55 pm Hi, i was wondering if anyone could point out what was her major, degree, or at least the field she studies. I have realized it is something like bioinformatics, but if anyone has more detail or information it will be very appreciated. PD English is not my first language, so do forgive any mistakes.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Apr 14, 2010 4:01 pm Apart from Fuyutsuki's position in a Metabiology faculty, and Yui being his student, we have effectively no direct information from the series about what characters with higher education actually studied. Bioinformatics (or meta-bioinformatics) seems like an entirely plausible guess for both of the Akagis.

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Wed Apr 14, 2010 5:07 pm Mr. Tines wrote: Bioinformatics (or meta-bioinformatics) seems like an entirely plausible guess for both of the Akagis.

[]:             Quote Post by ran1 » Wed Apr 14, 2010 5:33 pm M.F.A. in technobabble. Possibly some post grad work, but she was a bit too distracted by her mommy complex to pursue education any higher. They call her doctor because she teaches the CPR course, and you know as well as I do, that CPR saves lives.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Apr 14, 2010 10:30 pm Whatever Ritsuko originally specialized in would seem to be impossible to pinpoint... During her time at Gehirn and Nerv, she's managed to become at least superficially adept at practically every labcoat specialty there is (including those that exist only in NGE's universe). She's a pretty intellectually ludicrous character.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Apr 14, 2010 10:34 pm Azathoth wrote: [...] how much did Naoko even do with regards to the Evas themselves? She certainly knew what was up with them, at least to some degree, but she doesn't seem to have worked on them.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed Apr 14, 2010 11:10 pm Sachi wrote: Wasn't Naoko Akagi directly involved in Project E? Meaning, she was one of the top persons in charge of constructing an Evangelion.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Apr 15, 2010 8:42 am Ritsuko mentions that the technology that was used to transfer Naoko's personalities to the MAGI and that which is used to pilot the Evas is related, so Naoko might have been involved in the long-term endeavor to make Evas "pilot-able". This could explain her presence at Yui's CE.

[]:             Quote Post by tomrule123 » Thu Apr 15, 2010 10:03 am Wait, shouldn't this be in the "Discussion" section? Anyway, I don't think the series specified what degree she took at college... maybe somewhere related to science, biology... well, somewhere that her mother is doing...

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Thu Apr 15, 2010 3:44 pm Reichu wrote: During her time at Gehirn and Nerv, she's managed to become at least superficially adept at practically every labcoat specialty there is (including those that exist only in NGE's universe). She's a pretty intellectually ludicrous character.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Thu Apr 15, 2010 6:32 pm Clearly she has an advanced degree in SCIENCE! as a field in it's own right, separate from normal branches of scientific inquiry.

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Fri Apr 16, 2010 2:10 am Whaterevertheplotdemandsology.

[]:             Quote Post by Hekatos » Fri Apr 16, 2010 3:52 am I think she has some sort of medical knowledge / degree too...

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Fri Apr 16, 2010 4:07 am Ritsuko is a licensed theobiologist and mathemagician.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Apr 16, 2010 8:29 am Is it safe to assume her title of "Dr." is a doctorate in science rather than in medicine?

[]:             Quote Post by tomrule123 » Fri Apr 16, 2010 10:55 am NAveryW wrote: Ritsuko is a licensed theobiologist and mathemagician.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Apr 16, 2010 1:11 pm tomrule123 wrote: FIXED.

[]:             Quote Post by ran1 » Fri Apr 16, 2010 3:15 pm OH, HEY what's goin on in this thread since I left? AWW Shit Allemann wrote: Whaterevertheplotdemandsology.

[]:             Quote Post by JoeD80 » Fri Apr 16, 2010 3:42 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Is it safe to assume her title of "Dr." is a doctorate in science rather than in medicine?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Apr 16, 2010 4:19 pm ran1 wrote: -Metaphysical Biology
